creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 175256
patch from a git commit

Bump to the latest upstream release. This is an important security release.
    
https://nodejs.org/en/blog/release/v6.7.0/
https://nodejs.org/en/blog/vulnerability/september-2016-security-releases/

portlint: OK (-C, spurious warning about possible direct use of "python" command)
testport: OK (poudriere, 11.0-RC3, 10.[123]-R, 9.3-R, amd64/i386, default options)
testport: OK (poudriere, 11.0-RC3, 10.[123]-R, 9.3-R, amd64/i386, BUNDLED_SSL enabled)
